briefs.title: BC Recycling and Hazardous Waste Rules Updated — E-Waste and Producer Definitions Change Nov 21
briefs.summary: Effective November 21, 2025, BC updated its recycling and hazardous waste rules, expanding the definition of e-waste to include batteries and electrical products, and clarifying who counts as a 'producer' responsible for recycling obligations.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business imports, sells, or distributes electronics, batteries, or tires — you may now have new recycling obligations.

key_dates.label: BC Recycling and Hazardous Waste Regulation amendments take effect
